title: Fuel Tool: Customizable Fuels
description: Customize which items can be used as fuel for modpacks!
body:
**Fuel Tool, by jetpacker06**

This mod allows users/modpack developers to customize which items can be used as furnace fuel.

Perfect for modpacks!

With this mod, you can configure specific burn times for items.

Set new items to be fuels, or disable existing fuels.

Tutorial available at the GitHub [wiki.](https://github.com/jetpacker06/Fuel-Tool/wiki)

🔥🔥🔥
